name: Oni

traits.name: Regeneration
traits.text: The oni regains 10 Hit Points at the start of each of its turns if it has at least 1 Hit Point.

text:
# Oni

*Large Fiend, Lawful Evil*

A shape-shifting giant-kin trickster that regenerates wounds and stalks the night in borrowed forms.

### Actions

**Claw.** Melee Attack Roll: +7, reach 10 ft. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) Slashing damage plus 9 (2d8) Necrotic damage.

**Nightmare Ray.** Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 60 ft. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) Psychic damage, and the target has the Frightened condition until the start of the oni’s next turn.
